message:
docs: Add ZigBuilder auto-close migration plan

Create comprehensive plan for migrating codegen to use callback-based
auto-closing helpers (withParens, withBraces, withBrackets, etc.)
that guarantee bracket matching and prevent mismatch bugs.

Current state:
- 85 module files have emitConst helpers (Phase 2 done)
- 81 files use withInlineBlock for labeled blocks
- 94 core codegen files still use manual bracket matching

Goal: Zero manual bracket matching in codegen files.
